features.name: Lay On Hands
features.description: You have a pool of healing power that replenishes when you finish a Long Rest. As a Bonus Action, you can touch a creature and draw power from the pool to restore a number of Hit Points to that creature, up to the maximum amount remaining in your pool. You can also expend 5 Hit Points from your pool to cure the target of the Poisoned condition.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You can cast Paladin spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a list of spells each day and can use a Holy Symbol as a spellcasting focus.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.description: You gain the ability to use the mastery properties of two kinds of weapons of your choice.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: You gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice. If you later gain a new Fighting Style feat, you can replace this one with a different one.

features.name: Paladin's Smite
features.description: You always have the Divine Smite spell prepared. Additionally, you can cast one Smite spell (including Divine Smite) once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: You can channel divine energy from your deity to fuel magical effects. You gain one use of Channel Divinity, which you regain when you finish a Short or Long Rest. You gain one or more options for this feature from your subclass.

features.name: Paladin Subclass
features.description: You choose a Sacred Oath that represents your commitment to a divine cause. Your subclass grants you features at level 3 and again at levels 7, 15, and 20.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Faithful Steed
features.description: You always have the Find Steed spell prepared. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: Whenever you or a friendly creature within 10 feet of you must make a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus to the saving throw equal to your Charisma modifier (with a minimum bonus of +1). You must be conscious to grant this bonus.

features.name: Subclass feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen Sacred Oath.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Abjure Foes
features.description: As an action, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to force each creature of your choice within 30 feet to make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature is Frightened for 1 minute or until it takes damage. While Frightened, its speed is 0.

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be Frightened while you are conscious.

features.name: Radiant Strikes
features.description: You are so suffused with righteous might that all your melee weapon strikes carry divine power with them. Whenever you hit a creature with a melee weapon, the creature takes an extra 1d8 Radiant damage.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Restoring Touch
features.description: You can use a Bonus Action to expend 5 points from your Lay on Hands pool to end one of the following conditions on a creature you touch: Charmed, Frightened, or Stunned.

features.name: Subclass feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen Sacred Oath.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Aura Expansion
features.description: The range of your auras (Aura of Protection, Aura of Courage, and any aura granted by your subclass) increases to 30 feet.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Subclass feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen Sacred Oath.
